title: Vibe Coding for the Workplace
subtitle: Build your own apps and automations with AI — no coding required.
whyThisMatters: Browser-based AI app builders now let staff with no programming background create working tools — calculators, trackers, dashboards, and internal forms — through plain-language conversation. This hands-on workshop takes non-technical teams from first exposure to a working prototype they built themselves, with the judgment to use these tools safely and responsibly.
builtFor: Non-technical staff in operations, marketing, admin, HR, finance, and customer service
Teams that want to automate their own workflows without writing code
Managers exploring quick internal tools before committing to software spend
walkAwayWith: Explain what vibe coding and AI app builders can realistically do — and where they fall short.
Operate browser-based AI building tools to generate, preview, and modify a working application.
Describe, iterate, and debug an app entirely through outcome-focused natural language.
Build a working prototype that solves a real task from your own role.
Check an AI-built tool against basic safety, data privacy, and security criteria before sharing it.

modules.title: Capstone Build Lab: Automate Your Own Workflow

methodologyCaption: Roughly 70% of the day is hands-on: every participant builds on their own machine, ending with a capstone tool scoped from a real problem in their own role.
